texto: ...like the emperor striding confidently along without clothes, convinced by them and their inward monitions that their criticism is effecting changes in society.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Samuel F. Pickering Jr.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...like the emperor striding confidently along without clothes, convinced by them and their inwar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, criticism, emperor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao.
